name: Tulane University
summary: The university whose authorities, consulted by Inspector Legrasse, could shed no light upon either the cult or the image.
description:
The authorities at Tulane University could shed no light upon either the cult or the image when Legrasse sought answers about his swamp-caught statuette.

The fruitless consultation belongs to the inspector's hunt for the idol's meaning, recounted in the Tale of Inspector Legrasse — the failure that eventually carried him to the archaeologists.

sources.quote: The authorities at Tulane University could shed no light upon either cult or image
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
